issue_summary: Reuse commons-io, don't duplicate class BoundedInputStream (deprecated class)
javadoc_before:
/**
 * A stream that limits reading from a wrapped stream to a given number of bytes.
 *
 * @NotThreadSafe
 * @since 1.6
 */
javadoc_after:
/**
 * A stream that limits reading from a wrapped stream to a given number of bytes.
 *
 * @NotThreadSafe
 * @since 1.6
 * @deprecated Use {@link org.apache.commons.io.input.BoundedInputStream}.
 */
